# AutoReviewer golden vectors: comment-coverage suite. GENERATED by tests/vectors/regenerate.py -- do not hand-edit.
# Format: comment_ids_csv <TAB> edits (ct:bid; ...) <TAB> unaddressed_csv <TAB> status
# A comment is addressed iff a reply_to_comment/add_comment_only edit targets its id.
# Empty edits/unaddressed columns are literally empty; status is ALL_ADDRESSED | UNADDRESSED.
AR_COMMENT_1,AR_COMMENT_2	reply_to_comment:AR_COMMENT_1;add_comment_only:AR_COMMENT_2		ALL_ADDRESSED
AR_COMMENT_1,AR_COMMENT_2,AR_COMMENT_3	reply_to_comment:AR_COMMENT_1;reply_to_comment:AR_COMMENT_3	AR_COMMENT_2	UNADDRESSED
AR_COMMENT_1,AR_COMMENT_2		AR_COMMENT_1,AR_COMMENT_2	UNADDRESSED
	replace_text:AR_PARA_1		ALL_ADDRESSED
AR_COMMENT_1	add_comment_only:AR_PARA_5	AR_COMMENT_1	UNADDRESSED
AR_COMMENT_1	replace_text:AR_COMMENT_1	AR_COMMENT_1	UNADDRESSED
AR_COMMENT_1	accept_revision:AR_COMMENT_1	AR_COMMENT_1	UNADDRESSED
AR_COMMENT_1,AR_COMMENT_2	reply_to_comment:AR_COMMENT_1;reply_to_comment:AR_COMMENT_1;reply_to_comment:AR_COMMENT_2		ALL_ADDRESSED
AR_COMMENT_3,AR_COMMENT_1,AR_COMMENT_2		AR_COMMENT_3,AR_COMMENT_1,AR_COMMENT_2	UNADDRESSED
AR_COMMENT_1	Reply_To_Comment:AR_COMMENT_1		ALL_ADDRESSED
